# Acme Labs Values

## Our Core Values

### 1. Customer First
Every decision we make starts with the customer. We build what solves real
problems, not what's technically interesting.

### 2. Move Fast, Ship Often
We believe in rapid iteration. Small, frequent releases beat big, risky launches.

### 3. Radical Transparency
We share information openly. Everyone at Acme has access to company metrics,
financials, and strategic decisions.

### 4. Own Your Work
We hire smart people and give them autonomy. No micromanagement here.

### 5. Continuous Learning
Technology evolves fast. We invest in learning and growth for all team members.
